results.title: The Silence and the night
results.brief_description: A mime on the street is performing his usual show. Some people stand watching him, some go by giving him a vacant look. A girl walks through the crowd and passes by without stopping, not looking at him. Has the mime seen her?
results.description: A mime on the street is performing his usual show. Some people stand watching him, some go by giving him a vacant look. A girl walks through the crowd and passes by without stopping, not looking at him. Has the mime seen her?

results.title: The Shadow of ignorance: An inquiry
results.brief_description: Venereal disease in Britain, a programme introduced by Jo Grimmond, M.P. It avoids moral issues, and concentrates on facts: the symptoms of infection, the confidential nature of treatment at a special clinic and the contact slips for patients to give to those who infected them. At the end, three patients are interviewed: a prostitute, a boy and a girl (who talks good sense about parental attitudes). To some extent it will discourage promiscuity; certainly by making it clear that treatment is neither embarrassing nor painful it will encourage those who suspect that they have been infected to seek treatment. Restriction: To be shows to members and students of the medical profession and nursing profession.

results.title: The Sexually mature adult
results.brief_description: From the moment of conception to the instance of death our lives as sexual beings are endless. The film covers the physiology and emotions involved in mature sexual behaviour during the four stages of sexual response in intercourse.

results.title: The Seventh continent (Anamorphic)
results.creator_credit: Dusan Vukoric, Fimove Studio Koliba and Jadran Film (Zagreb)
results.brief_description: Two runaway children discover a magical island, the Seventh Continent. Soon, children of various nationalities and races come to the Seventh Continent where they create a new world of fun and fantasy far from adults. A Yugoslav-Czech co-production. In cinemascope - requires an anamorphic lense.

results.title: The Sediment problem
results.creator_credit: Gordon Thomas and University of Strathclyde
results.brief_description: An examination of the detrimental depletion of soil resources from the land by natural means and by man’s intervention. Shot at a number of locations in the Scottish Highlands and the Clyde Valley. Intended for students of civil engineering.

results.title: The Secret Files of J. Edgar Hoover
results.creator_credit: Jerry Kupcinet, Joseph Honig and Western International Syndication
results.brief_description: All personalities whose actions shaped 20th century America, and all unwitting stars in an infamous production are now revealed for the very first time in “The secret files of J. Edgar Hoover”. Power, fear, influence - serving under 8 presidents, he was accountable to none. Politicians came and went, but Hoover remained, a public servant who died a millionaire.

results.title: The Seat = Fotel
results.brief_description: A witty and telling view of the patterns of power using animated cartoon techniques. From above we watch a general meeting when a new committee member has to be elected. Each nominee is stopped from taking his place by other jealous workers, until one candidate is more resourceful than the others.

results.title: The Scribe
results.creator_credit: John Sebert, Ann Neely-Ray, Kenneth Neely-Ray and Film-Tele
results.brief_description: A newspaper editor decides to do a story on industrial safety and sends a reporter to a large construction site. But the reporter is Buster Keaton whose antics at the building cause some consternatin. However, the sixteen basic safety rules which apply on large construction sites are effectively and humourously illustrated. This is Buster Keaton’s final film.

results.title: The Rock of love = Sakhrat al hub
results.creator_credit: Rida Myassar and Egyptian Film Company
results.brief_description: Karima and Aadel are both escaping painful pasts and guarded secrets in Egypt. They meet in Beirut, a city where they find peace and where they fall in love. But as always, the road to love is a thorny one and they must both come to terms with their fears. For Karima, it is being stalked - is it the detective who is constantly turning up wherever she goes, or some other darker stranger? And Aadel must come to terms with his fears after a loveless marriage which ended in him brutally murdering his wife - for which he was imprisoned for one year! Starring Samira Ahmad and Aamad Homdy. In Arabic with no English subtitles.
